title: symphytum davisii
intro: Symphytum davisii, also known as Davis's comfrey, is a perennial herb belonging to the borage family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of allantoin, a compound that promotes wound healing and tissue repair. The health benefits of Symphytum davisii include reducing inflammation, soothing burns and skin irritations, and supporting bone and joint health. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its healing properties.
